claim_boundary.next_gate: Pre-register a block-robust acceptance statistic and replay the surviving budget under calibrated backend properties or an independent backend transcript.
claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: An iid proof, universal concentration law, calibrated backend evidence, real hardware execution, protocol or cryptographic soundness, sampling hardness, quantum advantage, BQP separation, or B10 credit.
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: Independent-seed-block ideal/light Aer replay of the R122 4096/8192-shot confidence boundary.

requirements.label: accepted R122 confidence boundary is consumed
five distinct root seeds define independent replay blocks
all trial rows preserve matched prefixes and hidden bundles
every block/profile/task has twelve trial rows
every trial binds its declared block seed
block, pooled, and leave-one-block-out statistics are materialized
paired 4096-to-8192 transitions are materialized per block/task
synthetic evidence is not promoted to hardware or soundness credit
point, pooled-confidence, and block-robust crossings remain separate
